note: Every production HTML page has one byte-identical source model and is generated through the Static Component Builder.

workflow.edit: edit src/pages/<slug>/sections/*.html or page.json; root HTML is rebuilt from src
workflow.check: npm run check:site-builder && npm run ai:check

rules.registered: src/pages/<slug> is the editable source; build-site may write root HTML after parity checks.
rules.pendingModel: Reconcile src/pages/<slug> with root HTML before adding the page to builder.pages.
rules.legacyHtml: Root HTML plus branch/data authoring helpers remain the source until a model is created and reconciled.
